feed.title: AO3 - Clark Kent/Bruce Wayne (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Clark Kent/Bruce Wayne on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: My neighbor the Kryptonian (not clickbait)
entry.summary:
Author: El_kun

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,295Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 168

Summary: Peter Parker's new upstairs neighbor is too nice, too tall, and keeps leaving first-aid kits by his door like he knows something. Clark Kent's downstairs neighbor is too skinny, too tired, and keeps coming home bleeding through his hoodie like he thinks no one notices. It takes a collapsed ceiling, a concrete beam, and one very awkward conversation for them to realize they're both dorks and nerds.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: The beat of your heart (And the beat of my wings)
entry.summary:
Author: Hubcap_Stealer_YumYum

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 13,169Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 7

Summary: Who knows? Maybe he’d even earn brownie points with the Batman for being able to take care of his precious city quickly.·˖✶𓆩🦇𓆪✶˖·˳.He wanted the Alien out of his city and he wanted him out NOW. Bruce Wayne, also known as the batman, watched over his city from above and violently repelled any intruders. That is, until a man with a blinding smile who can fly just as high as he can shows up, and a little boy who watched his parents die shortly after. TLDR: Bruce has bat wings and they attract the empathetic Kal'El, who helps him be a better person and father.

entry.title: Morbid Curiosity
entry.summary:
Author: Charlie_bear_23

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,840Chapters: 2/3Kudos: 58

Summary: Bruce Wayne has always has always been a very good person, it's what makes him such a good detective.But, that morbid curiosity has put him in a difficult position... because when it's Superman's, your friend and colleagues, dick you're curious about it can make things interesting.

entry.title: Dead Reckoning Part Two
entry.summary:
Author: ChemShaw

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 46,601Chapters: 3/12Kudos: 5

Summary: Aven is living on borrowed time, his body harboring something intelligent, dangerous, and very much awake. As powerful corporations circle and a desperate mission pushes him deep into enemy territory, survival demands disguises, secrets, and impossible trust. Love offers brief sanctuary, even as it makes everything more fragile. Hunted, exposed, and running out of room to run, Aven must face the truth:staying alive may cost more than dying ever would...

entry.title: Cantos of the Damned: A SuperBat Retelling of Dante's Inferno
entry.summary:
Author: EllEmmeFujo

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,765Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 2

Summary: A bet is placed. Batman is dead and finds himself in hell. With Constantine as his guide, he must find the person he treasures most and save them...even if it means damning himself to an eternity of fire and brimstone.

entry.title: build me up, buttercup!
entry.summary:
Author: sbreadyn

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,599Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 30

Summary: While, yes, it's typical for Superman to be saving animals in trouble from time to time, he always had a hard time bonding with cats. Even back on the farm, all the animals loved him — except cats. They would often just ignore and move past him to get to his Pa, and certain ones with an attitude would even hiss and bare their teeth at him.So when he takes the kitten and places it on the ground, he kinda just… stares for a while.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Gotham snow Nights
entry.summary:
Author: Rafka_oc

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,391Chapters: 3/6Kudos: 6

Summary: Superman and batman.Bruce Wayne and clark kent, two people in the same book but different page. Gotham city has gotten colder, icier since the joker had last attempted to hurt its innocent civilians. Bruce saved lives. A caped knight Stopped the joker from bombing the Trigate bridge and the Robinson Park, so many people would've died if batman hadn't thrown himself into danger. People began to notice that the guy in the bat suit wasn't just some stuck up vigilante. Batman is that of a hero that the people of Gotham had needed for such a long time now. Clark kent happens to agree, in fact he may be the biggest fan of batman anyone could be. He's tried talking to Batman as superman but he was always shoved off like some gnat floating around buzzing ear to ear. Clark began etching his way into to Batman's life, Bruce Wayne was in for it and he hated it with every fiber in his being. Being noticed by superman was like being noticed by the whole world. Secrets and danger were ahead and they both came barging right towards it. No matter what, superman will find a way to get closer to Batman, perhaps too close. Closer than the knight can handle.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: And I'll Do It Over Again (Hopefully Better This Time)
entry.summary:
Author: god_i_love_fanfics

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 909Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 21

Summary: If you told one Damian Wayne he’d find a small, pit-touched child shivering under an overpass in a pool of what appeared to be Lazarus water tainted only by rainwater and blood, he’d probably question your sanity. Of course, he’d keep what you’d said in mind, but ultimately regard the notion as the nonsensical babbling of an unstable fool. After all, people, especially children, don’t just bleed Pit waters. But that’s exactly what he’s looking at, isn’t it?

entry.title: The Night is Darkest (Just Before the Dawn)
entry.summary:
Author: m0ld7igma

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 8,776Chapters: 5/6Kudos: 1

Summary: Batman has never known anything but struggle, but holding up the sky is getting harder. He is deeply manically depressed, he is buzzing right at the edge of his skin ready to tear it all off, and his brain won't stop clearing the static at a thousand miles an hour.

entry.title: Worst First (Impression)
entry.summary:
Author: i8thecookie

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 43,218Chapters: 14/17Kudos: 247

Summary: Years ago, in Smallville, Bruce made an impression on Clark. And not a good one. Now Bruce is back in his life—charming, relentless, and completely unaware of the damage he left behind all those years ago. But Clark hasn't forgotten. And while Batman and Superman learn how to trust each other, their civilian identities are busy getting everything wrong.

entry.title: in these hands i’ll hide
entry.summary:
Author: attai

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 13,320Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 38

Summary: “God, I’m horrified, Bruce. I can’t close my eyes without thinking about it, without seeing you—“ His hands stay half-lifted, as if to ward off the memory. His chest heaves, eyes darting away, unwilling or unable to meet Bruce’s gaze fully. “You looked so afraid of me.” And how can Bruce possibly admit to Clark that he was without Clark twisting it into fuel for more self loathing? That feeling his own painfully human fragility frightened him more than he imagined it could; that the knowledge he allowed someone with the power to kill him in seconds this close, every single day, ran counter to everything he had ever stood for, everything he had built himself upon, without Clark hearing regret in every word?“It wasn’t you.” ”It was my hands.” Clark’s voice cracks.or : hit with a fear toxin specifically targeting him, clark doesn't know how to cope in the aftermath of hurting the person he cares for most

entry.title: Dawning
entry.summary:
Author: OXY_MORONIC

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 13,474Chapters: 5/?Kudos: 141

Summary: Bruce is not a good man.  He's horrible and jealous and sick on the inside- but, at least, he's trying, even when he has his hands full with his new son, his grumpy old man, and the fact that Superman keeps getting on his fucking nerves. Bruce is not a good man, and he knows it, and he'll track down whoever Superman is and all of his weaknesses if it's the last thing he ever does.   (SIDE NOTE - You can absolutely read this alone, but it will make it a bit more enjoyable if you read the prologue first!!! It's the first part in this series)

entry.summary:
Author: SadToad

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,706Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 25

Clark always found Bruce memorizing, he loved his will, his strength, his voice, his lips.... as a friend of course. However, things change when Lois confronts Clark about his 'admiration' of his best friend, and asks if he's in love with him. But Clark isn't gay! Right?

entry.title: I have emotional motion sickness
entry.summary:
Author: Ella_Katz

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,479Chapters: 1/3Kudos: 25

Summary: Why is Clark out to get him? Hasn’t he been a good boyfriend? Hasn’t he? Maybe he hasn’t, maybe he’s so sick in the brain that even Clark can sense it. Maybe by fattening him up, he would get back at Bruce for clearly ruining his life. Maybe- “Bruce? Breakfast is ready.” Clark’s grating voice was outside the bathroom door.   Unknown to anybody, Bruce had been struggling with food for nearly two decades.Unknown to anybody, Bruce stopped taking his medication.What follows is a man who couldn't stop himself from falling into a hole of intense disordered eating, paranoia, and unhealthy coping mechanisms that could cost him his life.That is, if the ones who love him don't stop him first.

entry.title: like grey skies (like a bird of paradise)
entry.summary:
Author: rainbow_nerds

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 58,930Chapters: 14/18Kudos: 470

Summary: He sighed to himself and downed the glass of champagne he'd been nursing—non-alcoholic, but enough to convince anyone who might give him a passing glance. He hated this, every time he had to do it. There was one surefire way to derail anyone who began wondering whether maybe Bruce Wayne was doing more than just donating funds to Batman. His tie hung loose around his neck, shirt unbuttoned to halfway down his chest, laughing too easily, pressing close to everyone he spoke to, whispering in ears, playing the part, until he turned and froze on the spot. Clark Kent, in his signature ill-fitting suit, stood holding a notebook and pen, staring at him with barely-concealed glee. Bruce cringed internally. He hated this. He especially hated when it had to be witnessed by someone he actually respected. or: After a Gala, Bruce and Clark end up in bed together. They're friends, just helping each other out, no strings attached. Which would be great, if Bruce hadn't been halfway to head-over-heels since the day they met.
